content:
✨ android-tv-debloat-toolkit | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To debloat, customize, and improve the performance of Android TV devices by removing unwanted applications and system services.
✨ Key Features: • Connect to Android TV over Wi-Fi (ADB Wireless) • Debloat TCL and Google bloatware • Remove Google TV Recommendations • Install APKs remotely • Disable Google Launcher safely
📖 Summary: This Python-based Windows application simplifies the customization of Android TV devices. It allows users to connect via Wi-Fi, debloat unnecessary apps, install custom launchers and APKs, and disable the default Google TV launcher, leading to a cleaner and faster user experience.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 RuView | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To transform commodity WiFi signals into a comprehensive sensing system for real-time human activity and vital sign monitoring, operating entirely on edge devices without cameras.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time human pose estimation (17 COCO keypoints)
📖 Summary: RuView is a Rust-based WiFi sensing platform that uses ESP32 sensors to capture and interpret Channel State Information (CSI) from WiFi signals. It enables real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring (breathing and heart rate), activity recognition, and environmental mapping without requiring cameras or wearables. The system operates entirely on edge hardware, learning environments locally and ensuring privacy.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 sbv | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a web-based interface for easily viewing, searching, and managing SMS, MMS, and call log backups created by the 'SMS Backup & Restore' Android application.
✨ Key Features: • Web application for viewing SMS/MMS backups • Imports 'SMS Backup & Restore' XML files • Texting app-like interface • Multi-user support with username/password • Idempotent imports to prevent duplicates
📖 Summary: SBV (SMS Backup Viewer) is a modern web application designed to view SMS and MMS message backups from XML files generated by the 'SMS Backup & Restore' app. It provides a user-friendly, texting app-like interface for browsing, searching, and filtering messages, including support for media attachments and call logs.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 maivi | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a fast, accurate, and convenient way to convert spoken words into text in real-time, directly on their local machine, with seamless integration into their workflow.
✨ Key Features: • Hotkey Recording (Alt+Q) • Real-time Transcription • Clipboard Integration • Floating Overlay • Smart Chunk Merging
📖 Summary: Maivi is a cross-platform desktop application that provides real-time, local voice-to-text transcription using advanced AI models. It features hotkey support for easy recording, automatic clipboard copying, and a floating overlay for live transcription, designed to be efficient and accurate even on CPU.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
